name: sandbox-agent
title: Sandbox Agent
description: A sandbox-backed prototype builder that gives each chat an isolated workspace and a live preview tab.

files.content:

Demo / Sandbox Workspace Agent

Build a frontend prototype in an isolated workspace and expose the live result

This workspace gives each chat an isolated project directory, lets the model write HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files, and renders the generated app through AI Elements WebPreview.

{runtimeState.statusLabel} {runtimeState.sandboxProvider} {runtimeState.chatModel}
); }

docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the sandbox-agent page, node runtime chat route, local preview route, preview health route, client workspace, sandbox session registry, shell/file tool surface, and AI Gateway env vars. It runs with a local isolated workspace by default; Vercel Sandbox credentials are optional if you want remote sandbox execution.
